conservative.name: Make Whole
conservative.requirements:
4 Power
Target within close range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You point a finger at a non-living, inanimate object of Poor or Average quality that is currently in bad shape or suffering from the Damaged condition. The item is repaired to working order, or the Damaged condition is removed
As above, and a Superior item may be affected

bane.description: All small plants within close range of you wither and die. Suffer 1 corruption

chaosStar.description: An item of the GM's choosing within close range also gains the Damaged condition or may be destroyed

reckless.name: Unmake
reckless.requirements:
4 Power
Target within close range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You point your finger at a non-living, inanimate object of Poor or Average quality. The item degrades and has the Damaged condition applies. If the item is already suffering the Damaged condition, it is destroyed
As above, and a Superior item may be affected

boon.description: If the item is wielded or held when the spell is cast, the person holding the item suffers 1 fatigue and 1 stress

bane.description: All small plants within close range of you wither and die. Suffer 2 corruption

chaosStar.description: All creatures (including you) within close range gain the Weakened condition for 3 turns
